title: DeepResearchOutput
description: JSON envelope emitted by the `deep-research` subcommand. Hand-maintained from `src/deep_research.rs::DeepResearchOutput`. The Rust type is the source of truth. v0.8.7 (GAP-WS-087/088) added `query` and the `resultados[].titulo` rename; v0.8.9 (GAP-WS-105) added news fields; v0.9.8 (GAP-WS-AGENT-READY-001 / ADR-0018) added agent metadata `usou_chrome`, `chrome_path_resolvido`, `chrome_canal` on metadados (not telemetry).

query.description: v0.8.7+ (GAP-WS-088): Original user query, mirroring `SearchOutput.query` for schema parity.

metadados.description: Run-level metadata: original query, per-sub-query outcomes, aggregation strategy, unique counts, total latency, cascade level.

resultados.description: Aggregated web evidence list, sorted by descending score (RRF or dedupe-by-url).

noticias.description: v0.8.9+ (GAP-WS-105): Aggregated news list. ALWAYS serialized — empty when zero news items were found or when --no-news was passed. News RRF scores live in their OWN score space and are NOT comparable with resultados[].score.

quantidade_noticias.description: v0.8.9+ (GAP-WS-105): Number of aggregated news items. ALWAYS serialized (0 with --no-news or zero news). The process exits 0 when EITHER vertical produced results; exit 5 only when web AND news are both empty.

sintese.description: Optional synthesised report, present only with --synthesize (skip_serializing_if). v0.8.9+ (GAP-WS-105): with news items present the report is dual-section, splitting --budget-tokens ~70% web / ~30% news.

total_resultados_unicos.description: Number of unique web results after deduplication / RRF.

total_noticias_unicas.description: v0.8.9+ (GAP-WS-105): Number of unique news items after news aggregation (parity with total_resultados_unicos). ALWAYS present (0 with --no-news).

nivel_cascata.description: Anti-bot cascade level reached during the deepest sub-query (0..=4). Null when no cascade was triggered.

usou_chrome.description: v0.9.8 agent contract (not telemetry): honest true when a Chrome/Chromium session was used for this deep-research run.

chrome_path_resolvido.description: v0.9.8 agent contract (not telemetry): resolved Chrome/Chromium binary path after shell/Flatpak resolution.

chrome_canal.description: v0.9.8 agent contract (not telemetry): install channel of the resolved browser.

texto.description: The sub-query text (serde rename of the Rust field `text` — the key is 'texto', NOT 'query').

estrategia.description: Origin label — 'heuristic', 'manual', or a template name.

tempo_ms.description: Wall-clock duration for this sub-query in milliseconds.

mensagem_erro.description: Error message. Present only when status == 'erro' (skip_serializing_if).

quantidade_noticias.description: v0.8.9+ (GAP-WS-105): Number of news items returned by this sub-query's news scan. ABSENT when the news vertical was skipped (--no-news) or unavailable mid-flight. 0 is an honest zero (the news SERP rendered without articles).

news_indisponivel.description: v0.8.9+ (GAP-WS-105): true when the news scan was expected but the news vertical became unavailable mid-flight (structured mid-flight failure field; production does not degrade to HTTP — v0.9.4 GAP-WS-113). Omitted otherwise — never false.

url.description: Source URL as returned by the upstream search. Deduplication uses the blake3 hash of the canonicalized URL.

titulo.description: v0.8.7+ (GAP-WS-087): Title (serde rename of the Rust field `title`). First non-empty across duplicates is kept.

url_exibicao.description: Display URL, kept from the first occurrence. Absent when not available (skip_serializing_if).

snippet.description: Snippet, first non-empty across duplicates. Absent when not available (skip_serializing_if).

score.description: Web-list score in [0.0, 1.0] (RRF sum normalized, or 1.0 for dedupe-by-url). Higher is better. NOT comparable with noticias[].score.

posicao.description: Original 1-indexed position in the source sub-query.

fontes.description: Texts of the sub-queries that produced this result.

posicao.description: 1-indexed position in the aggregated news list, reassigned after the merge.

titulo.description: Headline, kept from the most recent exemplar across duplicates.

url.description: Article URL as returned by the upstream search. Deduped by canonical-URL blake3 hash.

fonte.description: Publisher/source name, kept from the most recent exemplar. Absent when not extractable (skip_serializing_if).

data_relativa.description: Relative timestamp verbatim (e.g. 'há 2 horas', '3 hours ago'), kept from the most recent exemplar. Used for the recency tiebreak via relative_date_to_minutes. Absent when not extractable (skip_serializing_if).

thumbnail.description: Thumbnail URL, kept from the most recent exemplar. Absent when not extractable (skip_serializing_if).

score.description: News-only RRF score (RRF sum, or 1.0 for dedupe-by-url). Higher is better. Computed in a SEPARATE score space — NEVER comparable with resultados[].score (RRF scores over distinct lists are incomparable).

ocorrencias.description: Number of sub-queries in which this news item appeared.

formato.description: Format used to render the report (--synth-format; serde snake_case of SynthFormat).

corpo.description: The report body (Markdown, PlainText, or JSON tree serialized as string).

tokens_estimados.description: Approximate token count of the report body (4 chars ≈ 1 token). Bounded by --budget-tokens.

quantidade_referencias.description: Number of references cited in the report.
